description: CompositionWhite, round neck t-shirt  made of 100% polyester, engineered with Formotion and ClimaLite technologies, has a black neckline and green shoulder pathchesFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoPerfect for those who love to run and tennis buffs, this polyester t-shirt from adidas is deisgned with innovative and three-dimensional cuts that ensure a perfect Fit, offering comfort and boosting freedom of movement for active athletes. Created using a netted fabric, this polyester T-shirt wicks away sweat, keeping your dry and comfortable even during a heavy round of workouts or games. Pair this with performance shoes and you are all set to rule.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
